title: Editas Medicine to Announce Fourth Quarter/Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Editas Medicine Q4 2024 Financial Results Announcement. Announcement Details: Editas Medicine announced date for Q4 2024 financial results reporting. Release date: March 5, 2025. Format: Press release with business updates (no conference call). Investor Conference Participation: Company indicated participation in major investor conferences in March 2025 to discuss results and strategy. Conference Schedule: Typically includes: JPMorgan Healthcare Conference updates. Other major biotech investor conferences. One-on-one investor meetings. Financial Results Preview: Q4 2024 full-year review: Approximately $32M in total revenue for FY2024. Net loss approximately $237M for full year. Cash runway extended into Q2 2027. Cash Position: Approximately $270M in cash as of Q3 2024. Additional $57M received from DRI Healthcare sale of future Vertex payments. Strategic Updates: Company on track for in vivo HSC candidate declaration mid-2025. EDIT-401 pathway progressing toward IND submission. Investor Communication: Company emphasizing shift toward milestone-driven communications. Quarterly press releases replacing earnings calls. Increased focus on clinical and strategic developments.
